hero.headline: A new worksheet every day. Never the same one twice.
hero.subline: BrainForge generates printable, personalized developmental worksheets for every child — endless variety, in seconds.

step1.title: Profile
step1.body: Tell us your child's age and interests — 30 seconds.

step2.title: Daily plan
step2.body: Pick a development goal, theme and duration; we assemble the session.

step3.title: Print
step3.body: Print the worksheet and answer key — ready for a screen-free session.

gallery.title: Six worksheet types, endless variation
gallery.body: Every worksheet is algorithmically generated and unique — it never repeats.

pitch.title: 30 minutes of movement, memory games and creativity
pitch.body: Every daily plan mixes movement, memory and creative tasks around the worksheets — your child grows without ever needing a screen.

family.name: Family
family.body: Premium for multiple children, one subscription

school.name: School
school.body: For institutions, custom terms — get in touch
